criteria.text: Given a valid feedback JSON, When emit-feedback runs, Then a feedback record is appended locally with type/summary/detail/expected/actual/severity + a stable feedbackId, and the text is stored uncapped.
Given any non-feedback event, When it is sanitized, Then the strict allowlist + 40-char cap + object-drop still apply unchanged (regression).
Given a resend, When the same record is emitted again, Then it carries the same stable id (dedup-ready).
